docs.title: Gear Up. Get Out. Go Play.
docs.text: Loomi Company is a modern retail and software company built around the sports and lifestyles we love. We curate premium products for golf, snow sports, and everyday life — and we build the tools that make your time on the course even better.

docs.title: Golf
docs.text: From drivers to divot tools, we carry a carefully selected lineup of golf equipment, apparel, and accessories from the brands that matter. Whether you're breaking 80 or breaking in your first set of irons, we have what you need to play your best.

docs.title: Snow Sports
docs.text: When the greens are covered in white, we don't slow down. Our snow sports collection spans skiing and snowboarding gear, outerwear, and accessories built for the mountain.

docs.title: Lifestyle
docs.text: Golf polos that work at brunch. Base layers that double as everyday wear. Our lifestyle collection bridges the gap between sport and street with versatile pieces you'll reach for on and off the course.

docs.title: Golfiasta — GPS Golf Companion
docs.text:
Golfiasta is our golf utility app for iOS. It puts real course data in your pocket with no subscription required.

  • Find any course — Search thousands of US golf courses by name or browse nearby. Full offline database means no cell signal needed on the course.
  • Satellite hole maps — View every hole from above with fairways, greens, tees, and bunkers rendered on a satellite map.
  • Live GPS distances — Get accurate front, center, and back distances to the green updated in real time as you move.

Learn more about Golfiasta | Download on the App Store

docs.title: DollyCam — Dolly Zoom Camera
docs.text:
DollyCam turns your iPhone into a one-person dolly zoom rig. The app tracks a face in real time and adjusts zoom as you walk, recreating the Vertigo effect made famous by Hitchcock — no rail, no crew, no post-production.

  • Real-time dolly zoom — Face tracking drives automatic zoom adjustment as you walk toward or away from your subject.
  • Dual camera — Record from front and back cameras simultaneously with PiP or split-screen layouts.
  • Pro video controls — 4K, ProRes 422, 10 built-in LUTs, cinematic shutter lock, manual focus with peaking, and more.

Learn more about DollyCam | Coming soon to the App Store

docs.title: MakeLive — Video to Live Photo Converter
docs.text:
MakeLive turns any video into a Live Photo. Pick a video, trim it to the perfect moment, choose your thumbnail frame, and save it as a real Live Photo — complete with the long-press animation.

  • Precise trimming — Trim up to 3 seconds with drag handles and an overview timeline for long videos.
  • Thumbnail control — Pick the exact still frame for your Live Photo.
  • Import from anywhere — Browse videos from external drives, SD cards, and folders.

Learn more about MakeLive | Download on the App Store

docs.title: Our Approach
docs.text: We keep things simple. No bloated catalogs. No subscription traps. No unnecessary complexity. Every product we sell and every app we build reflects the same philosophy: give people quality gear and useful tools, then get out of the way so they can go play.

docs.title: Get in Touch
docs.text:
Loomi Trading Company, LLC

For inquiries, partnerships, or support: Email: contact@loomicompany.com

Loomi Trading Company, LLC. All rights reserved.

docs.title: Dolly Zoom Camera — Cinematic Video, Dual Camera
docs.text: DollyCam turns your iPhone into a one-person dolly zoom rig. The app tracks a face in real time and adjusts zoom as you walk toward or away from your subject, recreating the Vertigo effect made famous by Hitchcock — no rail, no crew, no post-production.

docs.title: Dolly Zoom
docs.text:
Tap a face, pick a direction, and press record. The app handles the rest:

  • Walk Away — zoom increases as you move back, keeping the subject the same size while the background stretches
  • Walk Toward — zoom decreases as you approach, compressing the background behind the subject
  • Adjustable zoom response and intensity sliders let you dial in the exact look
  • Noise rejection and frame smoothing eliminate jitter from handheld movement
  • Monotonic ratchet prevents zoom reversal during recording for a clean, one-direction push

docs.title: Dual Camera (PiP)
docs.text:
Record from front and back cameras simultaneously:

  • Floating picture-in-picture window you can drag anywhere on screen
  • Drag to the top or bottom edge for a 50/50 split-screen layout
  • Combined mode composites both feeds into a single video file
  • Separate mode saves two synchronized files — one from each camera

docs.title: Cinematic Exposure Lock
docs.text:
Lock the shutter to a 180-degree shutter angle at 24 or 30 fps for true film-look motion blur:

  • Auto ISO adapts to changing light while shutter speed stays fixed
  • Live ISO readout on screen
  • Low-light and overexposure warnings so you never clip

docs.title: Color Grading with LUTs
docs.text:
Apply .cube LUTs in real time — on the preview and baked into the recording:

  • 10 built-in looks: Cinema Teal, Nostalgic, Monochrome, Vivid, Warm Fade, and more
  • Import your own .cube files from any source
  • Intensity slider blends from 0% to 100%
  • GPU-accelerated Metal rendering pipeline

docs.title: Pro Video Controls
docs.text:
• 4K and 1080p resolution
  • 24, 25, 30, and 60 fps
  • HEVC (H.265), H.264, and Apple ProRes 422 (HQ, standard, LT, Proxy)
  • Four bitrate tiers with dynamic scaling for resolution and frame rate
  • Standard and Cinematic video stabilization
  • Auto, manual, and manual + focus peaking modes
  • Six white balance presets plus lock-current
  • External microphone detection with live audio level meter

docs.title: Composition Tools
docs.text:
• Rule of Thirds grid
  • Crosshair + Thirds overlay
  • 2.39:1 Cinemascope framing guide

docs.title: Save Anywhere
docs.text:
• Automatic DollyCam album in your Photo Library
  • Save directly to external drives, SD cards, or any folder on your device
  • Browse, play, and manage all your recordings in the built-in video library
  • Swipe-to-select for fast batch operations
  • Long-press any video to see resolution, FPS, codec, and file size at a glance

docs.title: Designed for Real Shoots
docs.text:
• Volume button triggers recording
  • Accelerometer-based orientation detection for accurate rotation
  • Thermal state monitoring warns you before the device throttles
  • No internet connection required — everything runs on-device

docs.title: No Subscription. No Ads.
docs.text:
DollyCam is a single purchase with no subscription. Every feature is included — no feature gates, no usage limits. The custom folder save feature is available as an optional one-time in-app purchase.

Coming soon to the App Store.

DollyCam is available on the App Store for iPhone.

docs.title: Golf GPS, Scorecard & Satellite Map
docs.text: Find any golf course, get live GPS distances, and track your scores — all on your phone. If you know how to use Apple Maps, you already know how to use Golfiasta. No tutorials, no sign-up screens, no learning curve. Just search, tap Play, and go.

docs.title: Find Courses Instantly
docs.text: Search by name or tap the location button to discover courses near you. Golfiasta includes a bundled database of thousands of US courses so course data loads instantly — no waiting for a server. International courses are available online via OpenStreetMap.

docs.title: Live GPS on a Satellite Map
docs.text: Select a course and tap Play — that's it. Every hole is displayed on a satellite map with tee boxes, fairways, greens, and bunkers rendered as color-coded overlays. See live yardage to the front, center, and back of the green, updated continuously as you move. Each hole view automatically aligns the camera to the tee-to-green bearing, so you see the hole the way you'd see it from the tee.

docs.title: Scorecard & Round History
docs.text: Keep score as you play with a beautifully designed scorecard. Tap any hole to enter your score with a simple +/- stepper anchored to par. Birdies get circles, bogeys get squares — just like a real paper scorecard. Review all your past rounds with scores, par comparisons, and course details. Your round history syncs across your Apple devices via iCloud.

docs.title: No Subscription. No Ads.
docs.text:
Golfiasta is a one-time purchase. No monthly fees, no ads, no account required. Your data stays on your device and syncs securely via iCloud.

Download on the App Store

Course layouts are derived from OpenStreetMap, available under the Open Database License (ODbL). GPS distances are approximate and intended for informational purposes only.

docs.title: Video to Live Photo Converter
docs.text: Turn any video into a Live Photo with MakeLive. Pick a video from your library, trim it down to the perfect moment, choose your thumbnail frame, and save it as a real Live Photo — complete with the long-press animation you know and love.

docs.title: Trim to the Perfect Moment
docs.text: Select any video from your photo library and use precise drag handles to trim up to 3 seconds of footage. An overview timeline lets you quickly navigate through long videos so you never have to scrub frame by frame. Videos stored in iCloud start playing instantly — no waiting for downloads.

docs.title: Choose Your Still Frame
docs.text: Pick the exact frame that becomes the still image for your Live Photo. Drag the keyframe marker through your trimmed clip to land on the perfect expression, the peak of the action, or any moment you want frozen in time.

docs.title: Preview Before You Save
docs.text: See your Live Photo in action before committing. Long-press the preview to watch the animation play back exactly as it will appear in your Photos library, on your Lock Screen, or when shared.

docs.title: Import from Anywhere
docs.text: Browse videos from external drives, SD cards, and folders — perfect for turning camera footage into Live Photos without importing to your photo library first. Your selected folder is remembered between sessions.

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Select any video from your photo library
  • Trim up to 3 seconds with precise drag handles
  • Overview timeline for quick navigation in long videos
  • Pick the exact still frame for your Live Photo thumbnail
  • Preview your Live Photo before saving
  • Import from external drives, SD cards, and folders
  • iCloud videos start playing instantly
  • Step-by-step progress when creating Live Photos
  • Saves as a proper Live Photo to your library

docs.title: No Subscription. No Ads.
docs.text:
MakeLive is free to download with all core features included. No monthly fees, no ads, no account required.

Download on the App Store

MakeLive is available on the App Store for iPhone.

docs.title: Privacy Policy
docs.text: Effective Date: February 28, 2026

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
This privacy policy covers all apps published by Loomi Trading Company LLC: Golfiasta, DollyCam, and MakeLive (collectively, "our Apps"). Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how our Apps handle your data.

The short version: Our Apps do not collect, store, or transmit any personal information. All processing happens on your device. There are no accounts, no analytics, no ads, and no third-party tracking SDKs.

docs.title: Golfiasta
docs.text: Golfiasta is a golf course finder and GPS distance app.

docs.title: Permissions
docs.text: • Location — Used solely to calculate distances on the golf course in real time. Location data is processed entirely on your device and is never sent to any server, stored, or shared with any third party. Location access is only active while the app is in use and only when you enter play mode. You can revoke location permission at any time through your device's Settings.

docs.title: Network Requests
docs.text: The app may make requests to the OpenStreetMap Overpass API to retrieve golf course map data when searching for courses not available in the offline database. These requests contain only geographic coordinates and search terms — no personal or device-identifying information is included.

docs.title: Data Storage
docs.text: Course data is stored locally on your device in a bundled database. Your score history is stored on your device and synced across your Apple devices via iCloud Key-Value Storage, which is tied to your Apple ID. This data contains only golf scores, course names, and course coordinates — no personal information. You can disable iCloud sync for the app in your device's iCloud settings. The app does not use any external databases or remote storage beyond Apple's iCloud service.

docs.title: DollyCam
docs.text: DollyCam is a cinematic video camera app with dolly zoom, dual camera, and pro video controls.

docs.title: Permissions
docs.text:
• Camera — Required to record video. Camera data is used only for the live viewfinder and video recording. It is never transmitted off your device.
  • Microphone — Required to record audio with your videos. Audio data is only written to the local video file.
  • Photo Library — Used to save recorded videos and to display your recordings in the built-in video library.

docs.title: Face Detection
docs.text: DollyCam uses Apple's on-device Vision framework to detect and track faces for the dolly zoom feature. Face detection runs entirely on your device. Face data is used only for real-time zoom adjustment and is never stored, logged, or transmitted.

docs.title: Network Requests
docs.text: DollyCam makes no network requests. The only external communication is with Apple's servers for in-app purchase verification, handled entirely by Apple's StoreKit framework.

docs.title: Data Storage
docs.text: App settings (resolution, frame rate, codec, LUT selection, zoom parameters, etc.) are stored locally via UserDefaults. User-imported LUT files are stored in the app's local Documents directory. Recorded videos are saved to the Photos library or to a user-chosen folder. No data is stored in iCloud or any remote server by the app.

docs.title: MakeLive
docs.text: MakeLive is a video to Live Photo converter.

docs.title: Permissions
docs.text: • Photo Library — Used to select videos and save the generated Live Photos. Photo library data is accessed only for the content you select and is never transmitted off your device.

docs.title: Network Requests
docs.text: MakeLive makes no network requests. The only external communication is with Apple's servers for in-app purchase verification, handled entirely by Apple's StoreKit framework. When you select a video stored in iCloud, Apple's Photos framework may download it through Apple's infrastructure — the app itself does not initiate any network connections.

docs.title: Data Storage
docs.text: A security-scoped bookmark for your selected folder is stored locally via UserDefaults. Temporary files are created during Live Photo generation and are not persisted. No data is stored in iCloud or any remote server by the app.

docs.title: Third-Party Services
docs.text: Our Apps do not use any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services. There are no third-party SDKs embedded in any of our Apps. All code uses only Apple's native frameworks.

docs.title: In-App Purchases
docs.text: DollyCam and MakeLive each offer a single optional non-consumable in-app purchase (custom folder save). Purchase transactions are handled entirely by Apple's StoreKit framework. We do not receive or store any payment information.

docs.title: Children's Privacy
docs.text: Our Apps do not collect any data from any user, including children under the age of 13.

docs.title: Changes to This Policy
docs.text: If we update this privacy policy, the revised version will be posted here with an updated effective date.

docs.title: Contact
docs.text:
If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:

loomitradingcompany@gmail.com
